productDisplayName: Nike Men's Field Trainer Textile Black Shoe
description: Partly a soccer shoe and partly for running, the nike Field Trainer Textile sneaker looks absolutely smart and cool. Replete with a suede and synthetic upper, it doubles up as a classic lifetsyle shoe as well. This pair comes with an extra pair of laces.Upper compact-grained suede leather and synthetic upper for style, durability and comfort Perforated side panels for maximum ventilation to the feet Swoosh wrap around for style and added structure to the mid and back foot Cotton twill lace-up system for comfort and snug-Fit Padded tongue with a textile inner and textile sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole for lightweight comfort Pivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of the foot Elevated ridges in the outsole with circular lugs along the impact guidance line till the midfoot for maximum traction and grip Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
